pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot starter parent version to 2.6.2, which is required for Java 17 compatibility.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly set the path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to maintain compatibility with Springfox/Swagger in Spring Boot 2.6+.
